q.id: Apa itu Mobile Legends Corporate Championship (MCC)?
q.en: What is Mobile Legends Corporate Championship (MCC)?

a.id: MCC adalah turnamen Mobile Legends: Bang Bang yang diperuntukkan khusus bagi tim-tim dari lingkungan perusahaan dan korporat di Indonesia. Tujuannya adalah mempererat hubungan antar karyawan melalui kompetisi esports yang sehat dan profesional.
a.en: MCC is a Mobile Legends: Bang Bang tournament exclusively for teams from corporate and company environments in Indonesia. The goal is to strengthen employee relationships through healthy and professional esports competition.

q.en: When will MCC Season 1 take place?

a.id: MCC Season 1 direncanakan berlangsung dari Mei-Juni 2026. Pendaftaran dibuka mulai 11 Mei 2026 dan ditutup 27 Mei 2026.
a.en: MCC Season 1 is planned to run from May-June 2026. Registration opens May 11, 2026 and closes May 27, 2026.

a.id: Tournament ini akan diselenggarakan secara online dan akan live stream pada kanal youtube resmi Mandiri Club eSports.
a.en: This tournament will be held online and will be live streamed on the official Mandiri Club eSports YouTube channel.

a.id: Semua Pertandingan akan di-live stream melalui kanal YouTube Mandiri Club eSports.
a.en: All of the matches will be live streamed via Mandiri Club eSports official YouTube.

a.id: Turnamen ini khusus untuk karyawan aktif perusahaan/instansi. Setiap anggota tim wajib berasal dari perusahaan yang sama. Satu perusahaan diperbolehkan mendaftarkan maksimal 2 tim.
a.en: This tournament is exclusively for active employees of a company or institution. All team members must be from the same company. One company may register a maximum of 2 teams.

a.id: Biaya pendaftaran adalah Rp 250.000 per tim. Pembayaran dilakukan setelah form registrasi disubmit. Panitia akan menghubungi PIC tim melalui WhatsApp dengan detail instruksi pembayaran.
a.en: The registration fee is Rp 250,000 per team. Payment is made after the registration form is submitted. The committee will contact the team PIC via WhatsApp with payment instructions.

a.id: Setiap tim wajib mendaftarkan minimum 5 pemain inti dan dapat mendaftarkan maksimal 2 pemain cadangan (total 7 pemain). Semua pemain harus didaftarkan sebelum Technical Meeting.
a.en: Each team must register a minimum of 5 main players and may register up to 2 substitute players (7 players total). All players must be registered before the Technical Meeting.

q.id: Apakah bisa mengganti pemain setelah pendaftaran?
q.en: Can players be changed after registration?

a.id: Pergantian pemain hanya dapat dilakukan sebelum Technical Meeting dengan mengajukan permohonan ke panitia. Setelah Technical Meeting, roster tim bersifat final dan tidak dapat diubah.
a.en: Player changes can only be made before the Technical Meeting by submitting a request to the committee. After the Technical Meeting, the team roster is final and cannot be changed.

q.en: What is the MCC competition format?

a.id:
• Fase Grup: Round-robin dalam grup, format Best of 1 (BO1).
  • Fase Eliminasi: Single elimination bracket, format Best of 3 (BO3).
  • Grand Final: Best of 5 (BO5), diselenggarakan offline.
a.en:
• Group Stage: Round-robin within group, Best of 1 (BO1) format.
  • Elimination Stage: Single elimination bracket, Best of 3 (BO3) format.
  • Grand Final: Best of 5 (BO5), held offline.

q.id: Apa yang terjadi jika tim tidak hadir saat jadwal bertanding?
q.en: What happens if a team doesn't show up for a scheduled match?

a.id: Tim diberikan toleransi 15 menit setelah jadwal yang ditetapkan. Jika melebihi waktu tersebut tanpa konfirmasi, tim dinyatakan WO (Walk Over) dan lawan diberikan kemenangan otomatis.
a.en: Teams are given a 15-minute grace period after the scheduled time. If exceeded without confirmation, the team is declared WO (Walk Over) and the opponent is awarded an automatic win.

a.id: Ya. Sistem ban-pick mengikuti aturan standar turnamen Mobile Legends: 3 ban per tim sebelum draft pick dimulai. Hero yang di-ban tidak dapat dipilih oleh kedua tim selama pertandingan tersebut.
a.en: Yes. The ban-pick system follows standard Mobile Legends tournament rules: 3 bans per team before the draft pick begins. Banned heroes cannot be picked by either team during that match.

q.en: Is the use of cheats or hacks allowed?

a.id: Sama sekali tidak. Penggunaan cheat, hack, modifikasi game, atau third-party tools yang tidak diizinkan akan mengakibatkan diskualifikasi permanen dari turnamen ini dan pelaporan ke pihak Moonton.
a.en: Absolutely not. Use of cheats, hacks, game modifications, or unauthorized third-party tools will result in permanent disqualification from the tournament and a report to Moonton.

q.id: Platform apa yang digunakan untuk komunikasi?
q.en: What platform is used for communication?

a.id: Seluruh komunikasi resmi dilakukan melalui grup WhatsApp yang dibuat panitia setelah Technical Meeting. Jadwal pertandingan, pengumuman, dan update lainnya akan dikirim melalui grup tersebut.
a.en: All official communication is done through a WhatsApp group created by the committee after the Technical Meeting. Match schedules, announcements, and updates will be sent through that group.

q.en: How is the match room created?

a.id: Room pertandingan dibuat oleh tim dengan seed lebih tinggi (atau tim yang disebut pertama dalam jadwal). Kode room dikirimkan ke lawan maksimal 5 menit sebelum jadwal. Instruksi detail akan diberikan di Technical Meeting.
a.en: The match room is created by the higher-seeded team (or the team listed first in the schedule). The room code must be sent to the opponent at least 5 minutes before the scheduled time. Detailed instructions will be given at the Technical Meeting.

q.en: Is a screenshot of the match result required?

a.id: Ya. Tim yang menang wajib mengirimkan screenshot hasil akhir pertandingan (layar victory/defeat + scoreboard) ke admin panitia di WhatsApp dalam waktu 30 menit setelah pertandingan selesai.
a.en: Yes. The winning team must send a screenshot of the final match result (victory/defeat screen + scoreboard) to the committee admin on WhatsApp within 30 minutes after the match ends.
